title: lithophragma glabrum var. bulbiferum
intro: Lithophragma glabrum var. bulbiferum, also known as California beardtongue, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the phlox family. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. It is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Lithophragma glabrum var. bulbiferum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
